title: The Listener, MCMLXXIX
excerpt: I remember the first time I heard music that was mine alone. The world receded into a soft blur, leaving only the voice in my ear. This painting is an attempt to capture that moment of isolation and intimacy.

title: The Precedent of Form
excerpt: I remember the way a screen could feel like a room—one you had built yourself, one you had come to know. And then someone told you the walls were not yours, that the shape of the door was owned by another. The light tha…
